Product.title: Product
Product.description: A product document containing core fields such as name, category, stock, price, barcode and design template.

sku.description: Stock Keeping Unit or barcode value

stock.description: Current stock count of the product

ownerId.description: UID of the user who owns the product

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the product was last updated

templateId.description: ID of the label template used for printing

UserLabelTemplate.title: UserLabelTemplate
UserLabelTemplate.description: A custom label template created by the user with advanced visual configurations.

backgroundColor.description: Hex or Tailwind color for label background

textColor.description: Hex or Tailwind color for label text

borderColor.description: Hex or Tailwind color for label border

borderStyle.description: Border style like solid, dashed, double, etc.

borderRadius.description: Border radius in pixels (0 for none, 4 for small, 8 for medium, 16 for large, 24 for full)

fontSizeStyle.description: Font size scaling: compact, standard, large

badgeIcon.description: Badge icon type: none, star, crown, leaf, check, premium

ownerId.description: UID of the user who owns the template

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the template was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the template was last updated

PricingSettings.title: PricingSettings
PricingSettings.description: Master configurations for indirect pricing intelligence set by an administrator.

markupFactor.description: Global markup margin factor (e.g. 1.3 for 30% margin)

minCompetitorIndex.description: Threshold price factor below competitor average to flag

lowStockThreshold.description: Threshold to apply dynamic scarcity markup

scarcityMarkup.description: Percent markup to apply to low stock products (e.g. 0.05)

highStockDiscount.description: Percent discount to apply to overstock products (e.g. 0.15)

Bundle.title: Bundle
Bundle.description: Joint product cross-selling rule configured by the administrator.

id.description: Unique identifier of the bundle rule

primaryProductId.description: ID of the primary product triggered

secondaryProductId.description: ID of the suggested complementary product

discount.description: Custom bundle discount override for the set

isActive.description: Whether this cross-selling rule is enabled

customTitle.description: Optional custom promotional text for the bundle (e.g. Combo Oficina)

/products/{productId}.description: The collection of products managed by users.

/templates/{templateId}.description: Custom label templates created by the user.

/bundles/{bundleId}.description: Cross-selling and product group suggestion associations.
